title: matricaria multiflora
intro: Matricaria multiflora, also known as multiflora chamomile, is a plant species that belongs to the daisy family and is native to Eastern Europe, Western Asia, and parts of Africa. The medicinal properties of Matricaria multiflora include its ability to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and exhibit antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of consuming Matricaria multiflora include calming effects, improved sleep quality, and relief from menstrual cramps and anxiety. Matricaria multiflora is commonly prepared as a herbal tea, infused oil, or dried flower for medicinal purposes, although more research is needed to fully understand its effects and potential interactions.
